comment: Approved secondary-source values per 100 g. Used by enrich-nutrition-from-overview.mjs. Only add entries with credible, attributable values.

astaxanthin.label: Astaxanthin
astaxanthin.source_note: Literature estimate for farmed Atlantic salmon; carotenoid content varies by feed and species (e.g. Turujman et al., 1997; USDA does not report astaxanthin).
